message:
feat(fp-types): interval_range builders (br-frankenpandas-xaom)

Closes br-frankenpandas-xaom (j8k4 Phase 2). Pandas-matching interval_range constructors on top of the Interval/IntervalClosed scaffolding from j8k4 Phase 1.

- interval_range_by_periods(start, end, periods, closed): N equal-width bins matching pd.interval_range(start, end, periods=N). Zero-periods, reversed-range, and non-finite endpoints return empty (pandas empty-IntervalIndex parity). Final right edge is set exactly to end to avoid accumulated float drift from step multiplication.
- interval_range_by_step(start, end, step, closed): step-driven construction matching pd.interval_range(freq=step). Rejects non-positive / NaN / Inf step via TypeError::InvalidIntervalStep. Rejects non-dividing step via TypeError::IntervalStepDoesNotDivide with relative float tolerance (1e-9 times span absolute value) so 10x step=0.1 accepts despite binary-float rounding.
- Two new TypeError variants with thiserror messages.

11 unit tests cover pandas-default cases, final-edge exactness, zero-periods, reversed range, closed-policy propagation, non-positive step rejection, NaN/Inf step rejection, non-dividing step rejection, float-tolerance acceptance.

rch: cargo test -p fp-types --lib interval_range (11 pass), cargo check --workspace --all-targets clean, cargo clippy -p fp-types --all-targets -D warnings clean, ubs exit 0.

Phase 3 (IndexLabel::Interval + cut/qcut return Categorical with IntervalIndex categories) deferred to another child bead of j8k4.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
